query:
-- Get all billing items with no service linked
SELECT bi.id, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE (bi.serviceExternalId IS NULL OR bi.serviceExternalId = '')
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 25;
command:

SELECT bi.id, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE (bi.serviceExternalId IS NULL OR bi.serviceExternalId = '')
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 25;
